Off Calendar Dec-02-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Diana Padilla. There being no appearance by the Petitioner, the Court ordered the matter off calendar.
